title: Marine chemical ecology in benthic environments.
author_string: Puglisi, Melany P, Sneed, Jennifer M, Ritson-Williams, Raphael, Young, Ryan
abstract: Covering: Most of 2013 up to the end of 2015 This review highlights the 2013-2015 marine chemical ecology literature for benthic bacteria and cyanobacteria, macroalgae, sponges, cnidarians, molluscs, other benthic invertebrates, and fish.
